verificationBanner.title: Email not verified
verificationBanner.desc: Please verify your email to unlock all features like saving favorites.

safetyGate.title: Recipes hidden for your safety
safetyGate.desc: We have hidden {{count}} recipe(s) because they contain {{allergens}}, which you marked as a severe or anaphylactic allergy.
safetyGate.overrideButton: I know the risk, show recipes

home.hasFavorites: Your favorites and some recommendations for today:
home.quotaWarning: Savings mode: Using local backup catalog due to high demand.
home.noRecipesDesc: Try other ingredients or more general terms so we can help you.
home.ctaDesc: Explore a specialized catalog of recipes meticulously curated for SIBO protocols and multiple food intolerances. Create your profile to dynamically filter our recipes and safeguard your mindful nutrition.

recipe.noInstructions: No instructions available for this recipe.
recipe.borderlineTooltip: Contains ingredients (e.g. Fructans) that approach your personal tolerance limit.

safety.overrideActiveDesc: You are viewing recipes containing your severe allergens at your own risk.

auth.acceptTerms: I accept the Privacy Policy and Terms, including the processing of my health data (GDPR).
auth.subtitle: Your well-being starts with what you eat
auth.termsRequired: You must accept the Privacy Policy and Terms (GDPR) to continue.

verify.verifying_desc: Please wait while we confirm your identity.
verify.success_desc: Your account is now fully active. Redirecting you to home...
verify.invalid_link: The link is invalid or has expired.
verify.failed: Could not verify your email at this time.
verify.resend_failed: Failed to resend email. Try again later.
verify.restricted_action: Verify your email to save favorites.

reset.title: Reset Password
reset.subtitle: Securely set a new password for your Wati account.
reset.success_desc: Your password has been changed successfully.
reset.success_desc_login: You can now sign in with your new credentials.
reset.too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reset.invalid_token: Reset token is missing or invalid.
reset.invalid_link_desc: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.

forgot.title: Forgot Password
forgot.desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.success_desc: If an account exists for {{email}}, you will receive a reset link shortly.

onboarding.selectIntolerances: Select your food intolerances or allergies. You can change them later.
onboarding.adjustSensitivity: Adjust sensitivity to personalize your alerts.
onboarding.selectForYou: Select your intolerances so Wati can take care of you.
onboarding.adjustForRecipes: Adjust sensitivity to personalize your recipes.

searchFeedback.title: We couldn't find that recipe
searchFeedback.desc: We didn't find "{{term}}" in our catalog, but our chef can learn it. Would you like to suggest it?
searchFeedback.submittedDesc: Thanks! We'll look into "{{term}}" and consider adding it to the catalog.
